mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_event (elder_id, type, content, location, handle_status, create_time) VALUES (#{elderId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{location}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warning_event WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM warning_event WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} AND handle_status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
